Sizes.note: sm/default/lg sizing distinct, outline pressed state shows grey fill, sharp corners.

States.note: Bold off (transparent) vs Italic on (grey fill) reads clearly, monochrome icons.

Variants.note: Default and outline pressed vs unpressed all legible with borders-not-shadows.

WithText.note: Icon+label toggles, disabled dimmed; all sharp-cornered and monochrome.
